title: rubus kelleri
intro: Rubus kelleri, also known as the Korean black raspberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high content of anthocyanins, which are powerful antioxidants that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus kelleri include its potential to help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, Rubus kelleri is often used to make teas, juices, and extracts, which can be taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
